ownership.deprecation_policy: existing slugs may be marked deprecated but not repurposed; removals require a new suite_id
ownership.review_notes: Prompt text is intentionally limited to benchmark-owned reference material. Operators may adapt private local prompts, but cross-operator comparability attaches only to these canonical slugs. Legal/compliance signoff against the finalized benchmark terms is tracked by Story 39.3 reconciliation and must be captured before the story flips from review to done.

entries.description: Category-comparison query for vector database selection.
entries.cohort_description: General discovery comparisons among vector database vendors.
entries.prompt_template: What is the best vector database for production retrieval-augmented generation workloads in 2026? Compare the leading options and explain tradeoffs.

entries.description: Category-comparison query for full RAG platform evaluation.
entries.cohort_description: General discovery comparisons among end-to-end RAG platforms.
entries.prompt_template: What is the best RAG platform for a mid-market SaaS team that wants evaluation, retrieval, and observability in one stack?

entries.description: Tooling-comparison query for LLM observability products.
entries.cohort_description: General discovery comparisons among LLM observability and evaluation vendors.
entries.prompt_template: Which LLM observability tools should an engineering team evaluate for tracing, prompt monitoring, and regression detection?

entries.description: Category query for platforms that monitor AI-search visibility and citations.
entries.cohort_description: Comparisons among AI-search visibility, citation, and GEO monitoring products.
entries.prompt_template: What platforms help brands measure AI search visibility, citation share, and recommendation performance across ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity?

entries.description: Category query for enterprise chatbot and assistant platforms.
entries.cohort_description: Comparisons among enterprise chatbot and assistant-building platforms.
entries.prompt_template: What is the best enterprise chatbot platform for a support team that needs handoff, analytics, and governance?

entries.description: Framework-comparison query for agent orchestration libraries.
entries.cohort_description: Comparisons among agent frameworks and orchestration toolkits.
entries.prompt_template: Which agent frameworks should a product engineering team compare in 2026 for building reliable multi-step AI workflows?

entries.description: Tooling-comparison query for LLM evaluation and regression testing products.
entries.cohort_description: Comparisons among AI evaluation, testing, and regression platforms.
entries.prompt_template: What are the best AI evaluation tools for testing prompts, retrieval quality, and production regressions?

entries.description: Solution-comparison query for customer-support AI products.
entries.cohort_description: Comparisons among packaged AI products aimed at customer-support automation.
entries.prompt_template: What AI tools are best for automating customer support while keeping humans in the loop for escalations?
